ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2007 Continued To Sep-24-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jun-12-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Brenda Fields.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Hearst Magazines, a division of Hearst Communications, Inc., a corp.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, and considering of the declaration filed, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Michael J. Crawford as follows:
Damages $56,057.00
Prejudgment Interest $17,784.66
Attorney's Fees $1,000.00
Costs $515.00, for a total of $75,356.66
Judgment signed in open court.
